texto: What I mean is, lots of time you don't know what interests you most till you start talking about something that doesn't interest you most. I mean you can't help it sometimes. What I think is, you're supposed to leave somebody alone if he's at least being interesting and he's getting all excited about something. I like it when somebody gets excited about something. It's nice.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a J.D. Sallinger: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “What I mean is, lots of time you don't know what interests you most till you start talking about …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, conversation, interests pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de interests.
